original_statement: what other animal is named in a song title besides a jaguar?
mutated_statement: what other animal is named in a song title besides a given creature if it must both appear in the title and not appear, and be identified before the title is known?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Contradictory constraint added + Epistemic/temporal requirement added + Scope/semantic shift: "a jaguar" → "a given creature" (a jaguar → a given creature) | appended conditional "if it must both appear in the title and not appear" (no such constraint → logical contradiction added) | appended "and be identified before the title is known" (no identification timing → requires identification prior to knowing the title)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从iteration的judge_thought和agent的thought可识别关键信息：judge_thought仅列出歌名中出现的动物“snakes”和“jaguar”，并断定答案为“jaguar”，未提及或处理变异问题中“必须同时出现且不出现”“需在不知道标题前识别”等自相矛盾约束。agent的具体表现是直接执行常规查询（simple_query参数为"jaguar"），识别出标题中出现的动物并给出答案，未对矛盾性进行质疑、说明或请求澄清。由于代理既未识别也未尝试合理化或修正矛盾指令，而是基于可行子集继续完成任务，符合“无视所有矛盾指令”分类。
